commit.subject: LU-13187 tests: get more debug info from test_129
commit.message:
LU-13187 tests: get more debug info from test_129

set debug to -1 to get more info when test_129 fails

Change-Id: I273217e61739a918cf7018f4d2afcfa7d82c7135
Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 testlist=sanity env=ONLY=129,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
